history.content:
<thought>
The observation shows that all cells to the right are either walls or lava. My immediate goal is to find a safe path away from the lava cells. Since the only clear path is to the left, I should turn left to move towards the unoccupied floor cells.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_LEFT
</action>

<thought>
The goal is located at row 07, column F, which is currently occupied by lava. Given the current layout, the safest and most direct path to the goal is to move forward. There are no obstacles or lava directly in front of me, and moving forward will bring me closer to the goal.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
The goal is located at row 07, column F, but it is currently occupied by lava. To reach the goal, I need to navigate around the lava. The safest path appears to be moving left to avoid the lava. Moving forward would place me in a dangerous position.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_LEFT
</action>

<thought>
The goal is still at row 07, column G, but it is now blocked by a wall. My current position is at row 07, column F, and the only safe move is to continue moving forward since the cell in front of me is not a wall or lava. This will bring me closer to the goal.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>
